prestazioni: LS7 (7.0L V8, GM engine code LS7) forced induction conversion using a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with a custom billet 10-rib pulley system, increasing boost to 12 psi (from the factory 8 psi) and requiring a Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke HSV W427-specific calibration for E85 compatibility and 750+ hp at the wheels

Full drivetrain reinforcement with an Albins ST3 sequential transaxle (replacing the stock Tremec TR-6060) paired with a PWR triple-plate carbon clutch and a custom 3.91:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration, supported by a Whiteline adjustable rear differential mount and polyurethane bushings

Engine internals upgrade including forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (2618 alloy, 12.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a Callies Compstar crankshaft, paired with a custom camshaft profile from COMP Cams (236/242 duration, 0.650" lift) and titanium retainers from Ferrea Racing Components for high-RPM reliability
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-WORKS HSV W427-specific kit, including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust outlets for a 3-inch diameter system

OEM+ aggressive stance achieved with a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension kit (with remote reservoirs) and custom-spec -30mm front and -25mm rear ride height, paired with Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5" (front) and 19x12" (rear) wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R19 front, 315/30 R19 rear)

Custom aerodynamic package featuring a carbon fiber front splitter from Seibon with integrated canards, a custom carbon fiber GT wing from APR Performance (adjustable 3-position angle, 72" width), and a full carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors and a custom HSV W427 badge in satin black
